subcodes.first_line: O Friend! By the life of God, the tale of sacrifice hath returned, and that which lay hidden in the knowledge of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الخلیل لعمر الله قد رجع حدیث الذبح و ما هو المستور فی علم الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @martyrs and martyrdom, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
